summary: Iteration 25: Regression testing for audit fixes E2/E4 (error handling in DataContext + silent logout fix in AuthContext), M2 (role-scoped Firestore user queries), M3 (limit+orderBy on messages/notifications queries). All 12 requested test scenarios pass. Zero Firestore index/permission errors detected. No regressions in any core flow.

test_results.app_loads_login_page: PASS — Login page renders at /login with email/password form and 'Try Demo Account' button
test_results.manager_demo_login: PASS — 'Log in as Manager' click authenticates via Firebase and redirects to /manager
test_results.referee_demo_login: PASS — 'Log in as Referee' click authenticates via Firebase and redirects to /dashboard
test_results.manager_dashboard_data: PASS — Manager dashboard shows GAMES THIS MONTH: 5, TOTAL EARNINGS: $75, PENDING PAYMENTS: 0, RATING: 4.9, Upcoming Games, Recent Payments sections
test_results.referee_dashboard_data: PASS — Referee dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Demo Referee', GAMES THIS MONTH: 2, TOTAL EARNINGS: $75, PENDING PAYMENTS: 0, RATING: 4.7, Upcoming Games, Quick Actions
test_results.messages_page_manager: PASS — Messages page loads at /messages with 7 messages and '4 new' badge for manager
test_results.messages_page_referee: PASS — Messages page loads at /messages with 7 messages and '4 new' badge for referee
test_results.notifications_bell_manager: PASS — topbar-notifications-button shows count '3', dropdown opens with 4 items and 'Mark all as read' button
test_results.notifications_bell_referee: PASS — topbar-notifications-button shows count '3', dropdown shows 'New message from Demo Manager', 'Game assigned', 'Payment processed' items
test_results.settings_page_manager: PASS — Settings page loads with 8 toggles (7 notification + 1 auto-refresh): New game assignments, Schedule changes, Payment updates, New messages, Email, Push (blocked warning), SMS, Auto-refresh
test_results.settings_page_referee: PASS — Settings page loads with 7 [role='switch'] toggles under Game Notifications, Communication, Delivery Methods
test_results.profile_manager: PASS — /profile loads with 'Demo Manager', Change Photo button, certifications (Tournament Director), 4.9/5.0 rating
test_results.profile_referee: PASS — /profile loads with 'Demo Referee', 45 Games, 3 years experience, NFHS Certified, Certified Official Level 2, Change Photo button, Performance Ratings with 5/5 rating
test_results.mark_all_notifications_read: PASS — Clicking 'Mark all as read' button stays on /manager (no crash), notification bell count clears
test_results.notification_item_click: PASS — Clicking individual notification item navigates correctly without crash
test_results.settings_toggle_save: PASS — Toggling a notification setting shows 'Settings updated — Your notification preferences have been saved.' toast (E2 fix confirmed working)
test_results.M2_role_scoped_queries: PASS — Both manager and referee data loads correctly; zero PERMISSION_DENIED errors; role-scoped getDocs(query(users, where('role','==','referee'))) + getDoc for current user works
test_results.M3_limit_orderby_messages: PASS — Messages load correctly with limit(50)+orderBy; zero 'requires an index' errors in console
test_results.M3_limit_orderby_notifications: PASS — Notifications load correctly with limit(100)+orderBy; zero index errors in console
test_results.E2_datacx_error_handling: PASS — Code review confirms markNotificationRead (lines 73-81), batchMarkPaymentsPaid (lines 104-113), saveNotificationPreferences (lines 126-134) all have try/catch; settings toggle saving confirmed live
test_results.E4_authctx_silent_logout: PASS — Code review confirms AuthContext lines 118-125: toast({title:'Could not load your profile'}) fires BEFORE setUser(null) in catch block
test_results.console_errors_firestore: PASS — Zero Firestore index/permission errors across both manager and referee logins with full data load. Only expected Google Analytics network errors (Fetch error from :) in headless env

notes: Console 'Fetch error from :' errors are from Google Analytics gtag.js failures in headless test environment — NOT app errors. Same as previous iterations.
One 'AbortError: signal is aborted without reason' from Firestore listener cleanup on logout — expected behavior when realtime listeners unmount.
Firebase Installations 503 error during referee session — external Firebase service network issue, not app code.
M2 fix: fetchAppData uses Promise.all([getDocs(where role==referee), getDocs(where role==manager), getDoc(currentUser)]) — all 3 queries return correct data.

M3 fix: messages query has where('participants','array-contains',user.id)+orderBy('created_at','desc')+limit(50); notifications query has where('recipient_id','==',user.id)+orderBy('created_at','desc')+limit(100). Composite indexes already deployed in firestore.indexes.json.
Settings updated toast confirms saveNotificationPreferencesRecord fires correctly and E2 catch block does not interfere with normal flow.
Mark all as read (notification bell) works for both roles without page crash — E2 markNotificationRead try/catch working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 all green. E2/E4/M2/M3 audit fixes verified in code and confirmed no regressions. Both manager and referee demo logins work. All dashboards, messages (7 messages each, limit(50)+orderBy working), notifications (3 items each, limit(100)+orderBy working), settings (7 toggles, 'Settings updated' toast fires on save), and profile pages work correctly. Zero Firestore index or permission errors. The topbar-notifications-button testid shows count and opens dropdown. 'Mark all as read' button works without crash. Settings notification toggles save correctly with toast confirmation. Logout works. Only expected console errors are Google Analytics gtag.js network failures (headless env).
rca_of_issues: N/A — No bugs found. All 3 audit fix categories (E2/E4 error handling, M2 role-scoped queries, M3 ordered+limited queries) work correctly in production.
